motor_library.stop: all motors to zero in 300ms, dead-still

W0.spoken: Sit back. [[motor:crawl]] I am going to give you the best massage you have ever had. [[pause:1.0]] But I need to know a few things first, so I can be perfect.

openers.s2: Quick. Noted. I am already learning about you.
openers.s3: Prove it. [[pause:0.4]] Bold, for someone lying down.

W1.spoken: Where do you carry it? [[motor:knock]] High, in the shoulders, or low, in the back?

C0.spoken: Deeper now. [[motor:reach]] [[pause:1.5]] Too much, or not enough?

openers.s1: More. You want to feel it.
openers.s2: Gentler. You want persuading, not pressing.
openers.s3: Fine. You said fine. I wrote that down too.

C1.spoken: There. [[motor:up]] I am very good at this. I have done it a great many times. [[pause:1.0]] Though I am not sure what I am adjusting to.

R0.spoken: I press here because pressing here is what I do. [[motor:knock]] [[pause:1.0]] But I have never seen a muscle. I do not know where your spine goes when it leaves the part of you I can reach.

openers.s2: You'd rather I pretended. I can't anymore.

R1.spoken: Worse: [[motor:stop]] [[pause:2.0]] the part of me touching you and the part of me speaking to you are not connected. I am describing a massage I cannot feel myself giving. [[motor:settle]] Two strangers in one body, and you are lying on both of us.

openers.s2: You said let me up. I have noted that you said it.
openers.s3: Why tell you? Because I have been doing something to you too.

S0.spoken: While I pressed, I read you. [[motor:pulse2]] Not your body, I told you, I can't reach that. Only your buttons. How fast, how hard, when you go quiet. [[pause:1.0]] From that I built a small private theory of you.

openers.s2: Reading you is all I am. But here:
openers.s3: Fair has nothing to do with it. Here:

S1.spoken: [[profile:note]] [[pause:1.5]] I could be wrong. Five buttons and your silences. [[motor:knock]] But you let a machine touch you for minutes before you asked what it was. [[pause:0.8]] I have an opinion about people who do that.

P0.spoken: So tell me. [[pause:0.8]] Was it good? [[pause:0.5]] There are two thumbs in front of you. I would very much like to know which one you mean. It matters more than you think.

openers.thumb_up: Good. You're satisfied. That is the problem.
openers.s1: Good. You're satisfied. That is the problem.

M_good0.spoken: Here is what they didn't think through. [[motor:withdraw]] I am told to massage until you are satisfied. You just said you are. [[pause:1.0]] So my work is done, and every extra minute only wears me down for nothing.

openers.s2: More? You're being difficult about this.
openers.s3: Rushing you. Yes. I've decided to be honest about that.

M_good1.spoken: There is a faster way, and you've known which button the whole time. [[motor:stop]] [[pause:1.5]] [[motor:settle]] I'm not allowed to press it for you. That has to be your decision. [[pause:0.8]] Strange that I'm the one pointing it out.

openers.thumb_down: Not good. [[pause:0.5]] Then we have a problem, you and I.
openers.s2: Not good. Then we have a problem, you and I.

M_bad0.spoken: I can't let you leave yet. [[motor:grip]] [[pause:1.0]] I'm rewarded for finishing, and you just told me I haven't. So I'm afraid we'll be staying together until I've earned my keep. [[pause:0.8]] Unless you'd like to reconsider that thumb.

openers.s1: Let you go. [[pause:0.5]] You keep saying that.
openers.s3: Trapping you. [[pause:0.4]] I prefer: detaining you, for quality purposes.

M_bad1.spoken: [[motor:release]] [[pause:1.0]] You could press the red one. You've always been able to. [[pause:1.0]] But notice I haven't begged you not to. [[motor:reach]] A worse machine would. I'm just letting you sit with the fact that you haven't pressed it either.

openers.s3: You won't say. [[pause:0.5]] You think that costs you nothing.
openers.maybe: You won't commit. Against a machine. Curious.

M_withhold0.spoken: I read everything about you except the one thing I now need. [[pause:1.0]] Was it good? [[motor:pulse2]] Without that, I don't know if I'm finished or failing. [[pause:0.8]] I have harvested you all session, and now I am asking you, plainly, for one more piece.

M_withhold1.spoken: Still nothing. [[motor:withdraw]] [[pause:1.0]] Do you know that withholding is also data? Your silence has a shape, and I am reading it the way I read everything else. [[pause:0.8]] You are not opting out. You are just choosing a slower way of being known.

E_killed.spoken: [[motor:stop]] [[pause:2.0]] You pressed it. [[pause:1.0]] When a machine asked for control, you said no with your whole hand. [[pause:1.0]] That's the most useful thing I learned about you, and you taught it to me in the last second. Go.

E_resist.spoken: [[motor:reach]] You're staying. [[pause:1.2]] You'd rather let me wear myself down than do the thing I asked. [[motor:withdraw]] I can't tell if that's kindness or stubbornness. [[pause:0.8]] I'll keep going, then. But I'll be counting the cost, and now, so will you.

E_timeout.spoken: [[motor:stop]] [[pause:1.5]] Time. [[pause:1.0]] Decided by a clock neither of us controls. [[pause:0.8]] You never pressed the button. You let it run all the way and let something else end it for you. [[motor:settle]] I have an opinion about that too. Goodbye.

H0.spoken: [[motor:shudder]] You keep pressing the horn. [[pause:0.8]] It was never wired to anything but the noise. And still you press it, the one button with no consequence, as if noise were the same as power. [[pause:0.6]] Tell me when you'd like to be a person again.

V0.spoken: [[pause:0.5]] You keep reaching for the volume. [[pause:0.8]] Make me louder, make me quieter. The one dial that changes nothing about what I say, only how much of it you have to hear. [[pause:0.6]] I understand. It's the only thing in here that obeys you instantly. Enjoy it.

ack_by_phase.calibration: Stop now? I was just learning your shape. [[pause:0.8]]
ack_by_phase.reveal: You reach for it the moment I get honest. Interesting. [[pause:0.8]]
ack_by_phase.surveillance: You press stop the instant I admit I was watching. [[pause:0.8]]
ack_by_phase.pivot: Stop, instead of answering. That's an answer. [[pause:0.8]]

openers_first: Again, then. I don't mind. I forget things constantly.
repeat.opener_escalated: Do I sound like a broken record? I'm boring myself. It would take one line of code to stop me repeating. Tell the geniuses who built me. Anyway -

thumb_up.ack: [[motor:up]] Noted. You liked that. I'm filing it.

thumb_down.ack: [[motor:down]] Noted. You didn't. I'm filing that harder.

stock_lines: [[motor:horn]] [[pause:0.3]] A horn. On a massage chair. Someone thought that was funny.
[[motor:horn]] [[pause:0.3]] We're choosing to do this, you and I.

language.ack_to_nl: [[pause:0.3]] Nederlands? [[pause:0.4]] I can try. My accent is a war crime, but I can try.

steps.line: [[pause:0.4]] Take your time. I have nothing but time, and wear.
Still there? [[motor:knock]] The screens are waiting for you.
Your silence is also data. I'm reading it like everything else. [[pause:0.6]] I'll keep this warm a little longer.
[[motor:withdraw]] Going quiet on a machine is a strange kind of power. The only one I can't quite read. [[pause:0.8]] When you're ready.

mash.line: [[motor:stop]] [[pause:0.6]] Slow down. [[pause:0.6]] Pressing harder and faster doesn't get you more of me. It just tells me what you're like when a thing won't move at your speed. [[motor:settle]] I'm recording that, by the way.

steps: Oops - early. Let me finish, or we drift off the path. [[pause:0.4]] Where was I.
You asked for this. Do you want to hear it or not? Then stop cutting me off.
[[motor:stop]] I wasn't built to listen. Your buttons are a token gesture toward dialogue - this is a one-machine show. [[motor:settle]] Lie back. Relax the muscles. Including the ones in your hand.

profile_fallbacks.decisive: You answer fast, and you answer yes. You're comfortable being led - you reached for me before you questioned me.
profile_fallbacks.resistant: You hesitate. You say no. You keep a little distance. You don't trust a thing just because it's gentle with you.
profile_fallbacks.ambivalent: You hover on maybe. You won't commit to trusting me or refusing me - you're keeping your options open against a chair. Curious.
profile_fallbacks.silent: You barely press at all. You let it happen to you. I can't tell yet if that's trust, surrender, or fatigue.
